name: Garlic Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine Parmesan, oregano, and parsley; mix well and set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter and garlic until smooth. Gradually beat in oil until the mixture is well combined.
3. Spread the butter mixture over one side of each bread slice.
4. Place the bread slices with the buttered side up in a greased large shallow baking pan.
5. Top each slice with 1/4 cup mozzarella cheese.
6. Sprinkle the Parmesan mixture evenly over the cheese on top of each slice.
7. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 10 to 12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the top is lightly browned.
8. Serve 2 slices per person.
